get_datetime.name: Get DateTime
get_datetime.description: Get current datetime or create a custom datetime value

format_datetime.name: Format DateTime
format_datetime.description: Format a datetime string to a custom format

parse_datetime.name: Parse DateTime
parse_datetime.description: Parse a datetime string to ISO format

add_to_datetime.name: Add To DateTime
add_to_datetime.description: Add time (days, hours, minutes, etc.) to a datetime

date_diff.name: Date Diff
date_diff.description: Calculate the difference between two datetimes

compare_datetime.name: Compare DateTime
compare_datetime.description: Compare two datetimes and return comparison result

get_period_bounds.name: Get Period Bounds
get_period_bounds.description: Get the start or end of a period (day, month, week, year)

days_in_month.name: Days In Month
days_in_month.description: Get the number of days in a month

is_between.name: Is Between
is_between.description: Check if a datetime is between two others

get_datetime_part.name: Get DateTime Part
get_datetime_part.description: Extract a part from datetime (year, month, day, hour, etc.)

get_weekday.name: Get Weekday
get_weekday.description: Get the weekday from a datetime

get_month_name.name: Get Month Name
get_month_name.description: Get the month name from a datetime

is_weekend.name: Is Weekend
is_weekend.description: Check if a datetime falls on a weekend
